query:
SELECT id, cnj, status_resumido, created_at, cliente_id
FROM processos
WHERE cnj LIKE '%TESTE%'
   OR cnj LIKE '%teste%'
   OR cnj LIKE '%test%'
   OR cnj = '0000000-00.0000.0.00.0000'
   OR LENGTH(cnj) < 10
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 50;
